Section Title: ... > [Mobile Recording SDK](https://www.recall.ai/product/mobile-recording-sdk)
Content:
Meeting Bot API
Ideal For
Recording virtual meetings (eg. Zoom, Google Meet)
Explicit recording consent notification
Building interactive meeting agents
See our Meeting Bot API
Desktop Recording SDK
Ideal For
Recording virtual or in-person meetings
A stealthier recording experience
Building into an existing desktop app
See our Desktop SDK
Mobile Recording SDK
Ideal For
Recording in-person meetings or phone calls
Recording system audio on your phone
Building into an existing mobile app
See our Mobile SDK

results.title: Recall.ai | LinkedIn
excerpts:
Section Title: Recall.ai > About us
Content:
Recall.ai is the API to get recordings, transcripts, and metadata from Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, Webex, Slack, In-person meetings, and more.
We support several form factors to capture meeting data:
1. Meeting Bot API: Through Recall.ai's API and fully managed bot infrastructure, you can easily white-label bots and send them to meetings to capture the audio, video, transcriptions, and metadata from the meeting-all through a simple API.
2. Desktop Recording SDK: Use our Desktop Recording SDK to get meeting data without a bot joining the call. 3. Mobile Recording SDK (coming soon): Use our Mobile Recording SDK to record phone calls and in-person meetings.
Website
[https://www.recall.ai/?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=company_page](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Erecall%2Eai%2F%3Futm_source%3Dlinkedin%26utm_medium%3Dcompany_page&urlhash=eR6M&trk=about_website)

Section Title: Recall.ai > Updates
Content:
That’s the right problem to have.[Share](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Elinkedin%2Ecom%2Fcompany%2Frecall-ai&trk=organization_guest_main-feed-card_share-cta)[Recall.ai](https://www.linkedin.com/company/recall-ai?trk=organization_guest_main-feed-card_feed-reaction-header) reposted this[Amanda Zhu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhu-amanda?trk=organization_guest_main-feed-card_feed-actor-name)Recall.ai • 51K followers3dWe launched a second product during our Series B. 6 months later usage graph looks like this. For context, we’re the API for meeting recording. We power it for over 3,000 companies. For years that meant one thing. A bot joins your call. Our Desktop Recording SDK is the second way. No bot. Recording happens natively inside your desktop app. The SDK detects the meeting, gives you audio/video, and transcripts with real speaker names (no speaker 1, speaker 2). 6 months in. Usage is growing 15% week over week.

[Report this post](https://www.linkedin.com/uas/login?fromSignIn=true&session_redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fcompany%2Frecall-ai&trk=organization_guest_main-feed-card_ellipsis-menu-semaphore-sign-in-redirect&guestReportContentType=POST&_f=guest-reporting)Build a bot-less meeting notetaker in a few hours. The Desktop Recording SDK:
- Generates transcripts (real-time + async)
- Get real speaker names (not speaker 1, speaker 2)
- Returns full meeting recordings (video & audio)
- Works across Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, Slack Huddles, and in-person meetings
No bots joining calls. Fully customizable.
